input.instructions: Solve the USACO 2024 February Gold problem 'Bessla Motors'. The problem involves finding destinations reachable from at least K distinct charging stations within a range constraint in a weighted graph. Provide the complete, optimized solution and follow the requested FINAL_ANSWER and JUSTIFICATION format.
